    <item>
        <guid>nba527956</guid>
        <title>Nikola Jokic: Notches triple-double in OT win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/nikola-jokic-3612</link>
        <description>Jokic produced 35 points (15-31 FG, 1-5 3Pt, 4-4 FT), 14 rebounds, 13 assists, five steals and two blocks in 43 minutes during Monday's 137-132 overtime victory over Portland.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 9:24:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527949</guid>
        <title>Joel Embiid: Strikes for 34 points in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/joel-embiid-3572</link>
        <description>Embiid racked up 34 points (8-19 FG, 2-6 3Pt, 16-19 FT), 12 rebounds, one assist and four blocks in 39 minutes during Monday's 115-102 loss to the Spurs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 8:40:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527944</guid>
        <title>Stephon Castle: Triple-doubles in victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/stephon-castle-6250</link>
        <description>Castle contributed 19 points (6-13 FG, 1-2 3Pt, 6-6 FT), 13 assists, 10 rebounds and two steals across 31 minutes during Monday's 115-102 win over the 76ers.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 7:43:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527943</guid>
        <title>Jalen Brunson: Double-doubles in victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-brunson-4405</link>
        <description>Brunson recorded 30 points (11-26 FG, 3-8 3Pt, 5-7 FT), 13 assists, three rebounds and two steals across 39 minutes in Monday's 108-105 win over Atlanta.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 6:55:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527942</guid>
        <title>Paolo Banchero: Drops 31 points in victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/paolo-banchero-5700</link>
        <description>Banchero tallied 31 points (10-16 FG, 1-2 3Pt, 10-10 FT), five rebounds, three assists and three steals in 38 minutes during Monday's 123-107 victory over the Pistons.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 6:54:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
